headline: How Meta’s AI Clone And SAIL Role Could Shape Future Earnings
summary: Meta Platforms (NasdaqGS:META) is developing a photorealistic AI clone of CEO Mark Zuckerberg to automate management and feedback across its workforce of roughly 75,000 employees. Meta has also joined Anthropic, IBM, and Microsoft as a founding member of the Shared AI License Foundation, or SAIL, an alliance focused on sharing AI related patents and core technologies. For you as an investor, these moves sit at the intersection of Meta's core social platforms, its push into AI models, and...
